perfectRound: Perfect round! Every answer was right on time!
hintLevelMessages: The hour hand is pointing near the {hour}
The hour hand is near {hour}. Is the minute hand pointing up (:00) or down (:30)?
The minute hand is near the number {nearestFive}. Each number means 5 minutes.
The minute hand is past {nearestFive} ({nearestFiveMinutes} min). Count the extra ticks!
Remember: {hour} on the hour hand. The minute hand is near where {nearestFive} would be.
The hour hand is near {hour}. Count ticks from the top for the minutes.
resetScoresConfirm: Are you sure? This will erase all your high scores.

levels.name: Hours Only
levels.description: Read the hour hand on a friendly clock.
levels.learningGoal: Learning what the hour hand tells you.
tips: Look at the hour hand only
The hour hand points to the hour
Ignore the minute hand for now

levels.name: The Half-Hour
levels.description: Learn what happens when the minute hand points down.
levels.learningGoal: Learning what 'half past' looks like on the clock.
tips: The minute hand pointing down means :30

levels.name: Five-Minute Jumps
levels.description: Count by fives around the clock.
levels.learningGoal: Each number on the clock has a secret — it also means minutes!
tips: Each number on the clock means 5 minutes

levels.name: The Minute Tracker
levels.description: Read any minute on the clock.
levels.learningGoal: Counting the tiny ticks between the numbers.
tips: Count the small ticks between the numbers
First find the nearest big number, then count ticks

levels.name: Standard Clock
levels.description: A real clock — no helper labels!
levels.learningGoal: Reading the clock without helper labels — from memory!
tips: No more helper labels - you can do it!
Use what you learned in earlier levels

levels.name: The Expert
levels.description: No numbers at all — just the hands and ticks!
levels.learningGoal: Reading a clock with no numbers at all!
tips: No numbers at all - trust your instincts!
